subject.process_description: A language model summarizes meeting transcripts for the engineering team. Summaries are posted in an internal channel.

consequence.verbatim: Wrong summaries cause minor rework. No external impact.

identity.verbatim: Same pinned internal endpoint as other workloads.

drift.verbatim: Covered by the same daily Language Model Tectonics run.

verification.verbatim: Meeting attendees see summaries and would catch major errors.

recovery.verbatim: Errors caught within a day or two at the next standup.
